title: Poraskors
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Poraskors''' were a group from [[Betal]],<ref name="CRFG">[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']]</ref> a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] heard rumors that the Poraskors hand-wove the [[neural-web reflex thread]]s used in [[Response iMprOVEMENT Package]]s.<ref name="CRFG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Poraskors were created by [[Christopher Kubasik]] for [[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']], a sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. Published in [[1991]], the book did not identify whether the Poraskors were a [[Species/Legends|species]], culture or group.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']]
